The '''gamwidge''' was an edible creature found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kinyen/Legends|Kinyen]]. [[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]] sometimes prepared [[Silvergrass|goatgrass]]-stuffed gamwidge for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]].

{{Creature-stub}}
